headline: Stifel Maintains Hold on Builders FirstSource, Lowers Price Target to $93
summary: Stifel  analyst W. Andrew Carter   maintains Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $115 to $93.
